name: com.zacharysnewman.health
description: Provides basic health and shield management for a project. Includes networking adapters for NGO, Mirror, and Photon Fusion, plus a full Photon Quantum 3 port (requires HEALTH_QUANTUM scripting define).

samples.description: Includes a demo scene to showcase how to use it with an example UI.
Demonstrates player health and shield with regen, overheal, death, and revive using TMP text labels.
Demonstrates health on a destructible object (crate/barrel) with no shield or regen using TMP text labels.
Demonstrates NPC health with shield bleed-through, regen interruption, and overcharge using TMP text labels.
Demonstrates health integration with Netcode for GameObjects. Requires com.unity.netcode.gameobjects.
Demonstrates health integration with Mirror Networking. Requires Mirror and the HEALTH_MIRROR scripting define.
Demonstrates health integration with Photon Fusion. Requires Fusion and the HEALTH_FUSION scripting define.
